compressed_prompt: Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula no commas
response:
# The Korean Peninsula

*(Verse 1)*
The mountains rise above the morning mist
Where ancient rivers carved the stone
Two flags are flying in the eastern wind
But once this land was just one home

*(Pre-Chorus)*
The DMZ runs like a scar across the earth
A line that split a people and a nation at its birth

*(Chorus)*
Oh Korea oh Korea
From Busan up to Pyongyang
The cranes still fly above the yellow sea
And the bells of Seoul still ring and sang
Oh Korea oh Korea
Your people share the same old blood
Though walls of silence stand between you now
May they crumble in the mud

*(Verse 2)*
The grandmothers still dream of northern towns
Where brothers walked the rice field rows
They write the names of those they left behind
On paper lanterns as the river flows

*(Pre-Chorus)*
The children in the south play in the neon light
The children in the north look up and wonder at the night

*(Chorus)*
Oh Korea oh Korea
From Busan up to Pyongyang
The cranes still fly above the yellow sea
And the bells of Seoul still ring and sang

*(Outro)*
One peninsula
One ancient song
One people waiting
To finally belong
